about.en: Sep7Ro is an online chess school for kids ages 6–11, teaching live on Zoom in small groups. Founded by Septi, who has 16+ years of experience and has worked with 1,400+ students worldwide. Classes are available in Romanian and English, and every family gets a free 50-minute demo lesson with no obligation to continue.
about.ro: Sep7Ro este o scoala de sah online pentru copii intre 6 si 11 ani, cu lectii live pe Zoom in grupe mici. Fondata de Septi, cu 16+ ani de experienta si peste 1.400 de elevi la nivel mondial. Clasele sunt disponibile in romana si engleza, iar fiecare familie primeste o lectie demo gratuita de 50 de minute, fara nicio obligatie.

en: Free 50-minute demo lesson, no commitment needed
Live Zoom classes in small groups (around 6 kids) so every child gets attention
Taught by Septi (16+ years experience, 1,400+ students worldwide)
Available in Romanian and English
Children ages 6–11, all levels welcome including complete beginners
Builds concentration, logical thinking, patience, and decision-making
Optional weekly tournaments to play with kids from other classes
Classes run once a week at a fixed weekly slot, year-round
ro: Lectie demo gratuita de 50 de minute, fara nicio obligatie
Lectii live pe Zoom in grupe mici (in jur de 6 copii), ca fiecare sa primeasca atentie
Predare de catre Septi (16+ ani experienta, 1.400+ elevi la nivel mondial)
Disponibil in romana si engleza
Copii intre 6 si 11 ani, toate nivelurile binevenite inclusiv incepatori totali
Dezvolta concentrarea, gandirea logica, rabdarea si capacitatea de decizie
Turnee saptamanale optionale pentru a juca cu copii din alte clase
Clasele au loc o data pe saptamana, in acelasi slot, pe tot parcursul anului

en: Septi — founder and lead teacher, 16+ years of experience, has worked with 1,400+ students worldwide. Each class is designed to feel like a unique adventure in the chess universe.
Adam — teaches 100+ Romanian and Moldovan students weekly, classes in English.
Daniel (National Master) — works with intermediate and advanced students.
ro: Septi — fondator si profesor principal, 16+ ani de experienta, a lucrat cu 1.400+ de elevi din toata lumea. Fiecare clasa e conceputa ca o aventura unica in universul sahului.
Adam — preda saptamanal la 100+ de elevi romani si moldoveni, cursuri in engleza.
Daniel (Maestru National) — lucreaza cu elevi de nivel intermediar si avansat.

chess_guide_description.en: Free chess guide for kids ages 4–6, a great starting point even before joining a class
chess_guide_description.ro: Ghid gratuit de sah pentru copii intre 4 si 6 ani, un punct de plecare excelent chiar inainte de a incepe o clasa

en: We're online only, all lessons run live over Zoom so there's no physical address to visit
No physical location, everything happens live on Zoom
We're 100% online, lessons run over Zoom so there's nowhere to visit in person
ro: Suntem doar online, toate lectiile sunt live pe Zoom, nu avem o adresa fizica
Nu avem locatie fizica, totul se intampla live pe Zoom
Suntem 100% online, lectiile sunt pe Zoom, nu ai unde sa vii in persoana

en: There aren't fixed walk-in hours, each group has its own weekly day and time, just tell me your availability and I'll match you with a group
No set walk-in hours since it's all group based, tell me your availability and I'll find a fit
There's no fixed schedule like a shop, each group has its own slot, just tell me when works for you
ro: Nu avem un program fix, fiecare grupa are ziua si ora ei, spune-mi disponibilitatea ta si te asortez cu o grupa
Nu functionam cu ore fixe ca un magazin, fiecare grupa are slotul ei, spune-mi cand iti convine
Nu e program clasic, fiecare grupa are ora ei, spune-mi disponibilitatea ta

en: Each group meets once a week, same day and time every week, year-round, just tell me your availability and time zone and I'll find a fit
It's a weekly thing, same slot every week year round, just need your availability and time zone
Groups meet once a week at a fixed day and time, tell me your availability and time zone and I'll sort you out
ro: Fiecare grupa se intalneste o data pe saptamana, in aceeasi zi si ora, tot anul, spune-mi disponibilitatea si fusul orar si gasesc ceva potrivit
E saptamanal, acelasi slot tot anul, am nevoie de disponibilitatea ta si fusul orar
Grupele se intalnesc o data pe saptamana la o ora fixa, spune-mi disponibilitatea si fusul orar

en: https://sep7ro.com
Here you go: https://sep7ro.com
Check us out here: https://sep7ro.com
ro: https://sep7ro.com
Poftim: https://sep7ro.com
Ne gasesti aici: https://sep7ro.com

en: Missed sessions can always be rescheduled, I guarantee a makeup session
No worries if you miss one, you always get a makeup session
Missed a class? Always rescheduled, that's guaranteed
ro: Sedintele pierdute se pot recupera mereu, e garantat
Nicio problema daca pierzi una, ai mereu o recuperare
Ai pierdut o clasa? Se recupereaza mereu, garantat

en: Missed sessions can always be rescheduled, I guarantee a makeup session
If you miss a session I'll always get you a makeup, no exceptions
Always reschedulable, just let me know when you miss one
ro: Sedintele pierdute se pot recupera mereu, e garantat
Daca pierzi o sedinta iti gasesc mereu o recuperare, fara exceptii
Se poate reprograma mereu, doar spune-mi cand pierzi una

late_arrival_policy: REPLACE WITH THE LATE ARRIVAL POLICY

en: Just a computer or tablet with Zoom installed, no physical chessboard needed
Just a laptop or tablet with Zoom, that's it, no chessboard needed
Nothing fancy, a computer or tablet with Zoom installed and you're set
ro: Doar un calculator sau tableta cu Zoom instalat, nu e nevoie de tabla de sah
Doar un laptop sau tableta cu Zoom, atat, nu e nevoie de tabla
Nimic complicat, calculator sau tableta cu Zoom si esti pregatit

en: No dress code, nothing special needed for an online lesson
No dress code at all, come as is
Nothing special, it's an online lesson not a uniform thing
ro: Nu exista cod de vestimentatie, nu e nevoie de nimic special pentru o lectie online
Niciun cod de vestimentatie, vino exact cum esti
Nimic special, e o lectie online nu o uniforma

en: I teach kids of different ages across a few age-based groups, just tell me your child's age and I'll find the right fit
No strict age limit, I've got groups for different ages, just tell me how old your child is
Kids of all sorts of ages, grouped by age range, tell me your child's age and I'll place them right
ro: Predau copii de varste diferite, in grupe pe varste, spune-mi cati ani are copilul si gasesc grupa potrivita
Nu e o limita stricta de varsta, am grupe pentru varste diferite, spune-mi cati ani are
Copii de toate varstele, grupati pe varsta, spune-mi cati ani are copilul tau

en: No experience needed, lessons work great for complete beginners too
Zero experience needed, total beginners do great
No prior chess needed at all, beginners are very welcome
ro: Nu e nevoie de experienta, lectiile sunt potrivite si pentru incepatori totali
Zero experienta necesara, incepatorii se descurca de minune
Nu e nevoie de nicio experienta anterioara, incepatorii sunt foarte bineveniti

en: Just join a few minutes early with your camera, mic, and audio already tested
Hop in a few minutes early, camera and mic tested beforehand
Join a bit early with audio and camera already checked
ro: Vino cu cateva minute mai devreme, cu camera, microfonul si sunetul deja testate
Intra cu cateva minute inainte, camera si microfonul testate dinainte
Vino un pic mai devreme cu audio si camera deja verificate

en: No need, lessons are fully online so there's no travel involved
Nothing to get to, it's all online
No travel needed at all, everything's on Zoom
ro: Nu e nevoie, lectiile sunt complet online, nu implica nicio deplasare
Nu ai unde sa ajungi, totul e online
Nicio deplasare necesara, totul se intampla pe Zoom

en: Lessons are online so there's no physical accessibility barrier, if your child has specific needs just let me know and I'll do my best to accommodate
Being online removes most physical barriers, if your child has specific needs tell me and I'll do my best
No physical access issues since it's all on Zoom, let me know if there's anything specific I should account for
ro: Lectiile sunt online, asa ca nu exista bariere fizice, daca copilul are nevoi speciale spune-mi si fac tot posibilul sa ma adaptez
Fiind online, majoritatea barierelor fizice nu mai exista, daca e ceva specific spune-mi si fac tot ce pot
Nicio problema de acces fizic fiind totul pe Zoom, spune-mi daca e ceva de care ar trebui sa tin cont

en: Every family gets one free demo lesson, about 50 minutes, before deciding whether to enroll, no obligation at all
You get one free demo first, about 50 minutes, zero obligation to continue after
First lesson's always free, around 50 minutes, no pressure to enroll after that
ro: Fiecare familie primeste o lectie demo gratuita, in jur de 50 minute, inainte sa decida daca se inscrie, fara nicio obligatie
Primesti o lectie demo gratuita mai intai, in jur de 50 minute, zero obligatie sa continui
Prima lectie e mereu gratuita, in jur de 50 minute, fara presiune sa te inscrii dupa

en: I don't currently offer drop-in sessions, lessons are part of an ongoing weekly group, though everyone starts with a free demo lesson
No drop-ins right now, it's weekly groups, but everyone starts with a free demo
Not doing drop-in sessions at the moment, groups run weekly, the free demo gets you started though
ro: Nu ofer momentan sedinte drop-in, lectiile fac parte dintr-o grupa saptamanala continua, dar toata lumea incepe cu o lectie demo gratuita
Nu fac drop-in acum, grupele sunt saptamanale, dar demo-ul gratuit te ajuta sa incepi
Momentan nu am sedinte drop-in, grupele merg saptamanal, insa demo-ul gratuit e un bun punct de start

en: Groups are kept small, often around 6 children, so every child gets attention
I keep groups small, usually around 6 kids, so everyone gets attention
Small groups, around 6 children typically, so no one gets lost in the crowd
ro: Grupele sunt mici, de obicei in jur de 6 copii, ca fiecare copil sa primeasca atentie
Tin grupele mici, de obicei in jur de 6 copii, ca toata lumea sa primeasca atentie
Grupe mici, in jur de 6 copii de regula, ca nimeni sa nu se piarda in multime

en: Spots can change, so let me check the current openings myself and confirm with you
Spots shift around, let me check what's open right now and confirm
Availability changes a lot, give me a sec to check current openings
ro: Locurile se pot schimba, las-ma sa verific disponibilitatea actuala si iti confirm
Disponibilitatea se schimba des, da-mi o secunda sa verific locurile libere
Locurile fluctueaza mult, iti confirm imediat ce verific

description.en: Relaxed, curious kids who enjoy exploring the game at their own pace
description.ro: Copii relaxati, curiosi, care exploreaza jocul in ritmul lor

description.en: Competitive kids who enjoy a challenge

en: 10% off if you enroll within the first 24 hours after the demo lesson
10% off for the 3-month package
10% off for each friend you refer; bring 7 friends and chess is free
25% sibling discount for a second enrolled child
50% twin discount for a second twin in the same class
Missed sessions can always be made up (guaranteed)
ro: 10% reducere pentru inscrierea in primele 24h dupa lectia demo
10% reducere pentru pachetul de 3 luni
10% reducere pentru fiecare prieten adus; la 7 prieteni, sah gratuit
25% reducere pentru al doilea copil inscris din familie
50% reducere pentru al doilea geaman/geamana in aceeasi clasa
Sedintele absentate se pot recupera, garantat

en: A computer or tablet with Zoom installed
A quiet place, away from the TV or other conversations
Camera, microphone, and audio tested before class
As much independence as possible for the child during the lesson
No chessboard needed
ro: Calculator sau tableta, cu Zoom instalat
Un loc linistit, fara TV sau alte discutii in jur
Camera, microfonul si audio testate inainte de clasa
Cat mai multa independenta pentru copil in timpul lectiei
Nu este nevoie de tabla de sah

en: Go to lichess.org and create a free account (choose an easy password the child can remember)
Activate Kid Mode: lichess.org/account/kid
Join our team "Sep7Ro": lichess.org/team/prosep (password: d4d5c4)
Optionally install the app or save lichess.org as a browser shortcut, and stay logged in
Practice in LEARN -> CHESS BASICS and FUNDAMENTALS
Then PLAY -> Play against the computer, level 1-3 (winning isn't the priority, just getting comfortable)
ro: Intrati pe lichess.org si creati un cont gratuit (o parola usoara, pe care copilul sa o tina minte)
Activati modul pentru copii: lichess.org/account/kid
Intrati in echipa noastra "Sep7Ro": lichess.org/team/prosep (parola: d4d5c4)
Optional, descarcati aplicatia sau salvati lichess.org ca shortcut in browser, si ramaneti logati
Exersati la LEARN -> CHESS BASICS si FUNDAMENTALS
Apoi PLAY -> Play against computer, nivel 1-3 (nu castigul e prioritatea, ci obisnuinta cu jocul)

tournaments.en: Tournaments are optional. The first session is free as a trial, then there's a fee per session. Romania: Thursdays at 18:30 Romania time. UK: Thursdays at 18:00 UK time and Saturdays at 18:45 UK time (£9/session). Sessions last 75 minutes and are social, with kids from all classes playing together
tournaments.ro: Turneele sunt optionale. Prima participare este gratuita, de incercare, apoi se aplica o taxa per participare. Romania: joia, ora 18:30 ora Romaniei. UK: joia ora 18:00 si sambata ora 18:45 ora UK (9 lire/participare). Sesiunile dureaza 75 de minute si sunt sociale, cu copii din toate clasele

demo_class_note.en: The free demo lesson is just for evaluation, no obligation to continue
demo_class_note.ro: Lectia demo gratuita e doar pentru evaluare, nu implica nicio obligatie de a continua

en: Regular weekly lessons run 60 minutes with a short break, the free demo lesson runs about 50 minutes
Weekly lessons are 60 minutes with a quick break, the demo's around 50 minutes
Lessons run an hour with a short break, demo's a bit shorter at around 50 minutes
ro: Lectiile saptamanale obisnuite dureaza 60 de minute cu o pauza scurta, iar lectia demo gratuita dureaza aproximativ 50 de minute
Lectiile saptamanale dureaza 60 de minute cu o pauza scurta, demo-ul dureaza aproximativ 50 de minute
Lectiile dureaza o ora cu o pauza scurta, demo-ul e un pic mai scurt, in jur de 50 minute
